description_for_human: AI automation risk scores for 146 occupations in Saudi Arabia
description_for_model: Provides AI automation risk scores (0-100) for 146 occupations in Saudi Arabia based on GOSI Q4-2024 data, WEF projections, and academic research. Use this to answer questions about job automation risk, Saudization, Nitaqat, salary ranges, and career transitions in the Saudi labor market.
